summary: Completed frontend testing of Soul Food auth system. All 10 features tested and working correctly. 13/13 backend API tests pass. All UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth page correctly implements 3 tabs: Sign In, Sign Up, Beta - all working
Password validation on registration enforces 8+ chars and 3 of 4 criteria (uppercase, lowercase, number, special)
Beta login correctly redirects to /my-library after successful authentication
My Library page correctly shows user welcome card with name, email, role badge, and 2FA status
2FA Setup page shows both Email Verification and Authenticator App options
Google OAuth button correctly redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Rewards points display shows 0 points for new users with earn rate info
seed_data_creation: Created test users during registration tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth frontend fully tested. All features working: 1) Registration form creates account and redirects to /my-library, 2) Login form authenticates and redirects to /my-library, 3) Beta login (instructor/test123) works and shows 2FA Enabled badge, 4) Google OAuth button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com, 5) My Library shows welcome card with name/email/role/2FA status, 6) Rewards points display shows balance and earn rate, 7) My Library redirects to /auth if not logged in, 8) 2FA Setup page shows email and authenticator app options, 9) Sign Out from My Library returns to homepage, 10) All backend auth APIs working correctly.

auth_page_registration.details: Sign Up tab shows Full Name, Email, Username, Password fields. Password validation enforces strength requirements. Creates account and redirects to /my-library.

auth_page_login.details: Sign In tab shows Email/Username and Password fields. Authenticates user and redirects to /my-library.

auth_page_beta_login.details: Beta tab shows Username and Password fields. instructor/test123 credentials work. Redirects to /my-library with instructor_tester role and 2FA Enabled badge.

google_oauth_button.details: Sign in with Google button visible on Sign In and Sign Up tabs. Redirects to auth.emergentagent.com with correct redirect URL.

my_library_welcome_card.details: Shows user avatar, name, email, role badge (member/instructor_tester), and 2FA status badge when enabled.

my_library_2fa_status.details: Shows green '2FA Enabled' badge for beta users. Shows 'Enable 2FA' button for regular users without 2FA.

my_library_rewards_display.details: Shows Soul Food Rewards card with points balance, dollar value, and earn rate (1 point per $10 spent).

my_library_auth_redirect.details: Redirects to /auth when accessing /my-library without being logged in.

2fa_setup_page.details: Shows 'Set Up Two-Factor Authentication' with Email Verification and Authenticator App options. Redirects to /auth if not logged in.

sign_out_navigation.details: Sign Out button in My Library header clears localStorage and redirects to homepage.

backend_api_tests: Rewards balance returns points and earn rate
Get current user with token works
frontend_ui_tests: Auth page loads with Sign In tab active
Sign Up tab shows registration form
Beta tab shows beta login form
My Library shows welcome card with user info
My Library redirects to /auth when not logged in
Google OAuth button redirects to auth.emergentagent.com
Registration creates account and redirects to /my-library
